## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated the smallest relevant test first
- [ ] `corepack pnpm check`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm --filter @future/web build`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm test:e2e` when browser behavior changes
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] No secrets, private data, generated reports, logs, or SQLite files are included
